all_six.title: Discover at least 3 distinct Alex's Caves biome types

boss_cave.title: Find a boss chamber or unique structure inside Alex's Caves

cave_mob_kill.title: Kill at least one unique Alex's Caves creature (alexscaves: entity)

subtitle.text: Not all caves are empty. Most of them are angry.

description: Alex's Caves biome mobs are unique to their environment.
They do not follow vanilla rules for aggression or behavior.
Approach each new biome type as if it is hostile until proven otherwise.
The Nucleeper (alexscaves:nucleeper) is in the Cryptic Eye chain.
Remember this. You will come back for it.
Boss chambers and unique structures appear in cave biomes.
They hold Alex's Caves loot tables — unique items per biome.
The cave system and the ocean system overlap at depth.
The Abyssal Chasm biome connects to the abyssal age narrative.
→ Find a boss chamber or unique structure [check]
→ Kill a unique Alex's Caves creature [check]
